FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Optimizes the retrieval of time-stamped strings for faster access.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Improves the speed at which players can access time-related data in games.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Allows dynamic updates to time-stamped strings without needing a full reload.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Enables real-time updates for players, making experiences more seamless.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Enhances the speed of fetching version control identifiers for strings.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Ensures players benefit from quicker updates and fixes in games.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Facilitates live changes to version control identifiers without interruption.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Allows players to experience continuous improvements without downtime.
